stemHtml: When radar vectoring is ended, what phraseology does the controller use to instruct the pilot to resume navigation?

options.a: D-CC resume own navigation, direct XX VOR, 270° track 25 miles.
options.b: D-CC resume own navigation, direct XX VOR, 270° T.
options.d: D-CC resume own navigation, direct XX VOR, 25 miles from YYYY.
